headline: Packaging Corp Gears Up for Q2 Earnings: What to Expect?
summary: PKG is set to post Q2 results on July 22, with revenues rising 10.7% as the Greif acquisition is expected to support earnings despite lower EPS estimates.

headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock with Promising Prospects and 2 We Find Risky
summary: While the S&P 500 (^GSPC) includes industry leaders, not every stock in the index is a winner. Some companies are past their prime, weighed down by poor execution, weak financials, or structural headwinds.

raw.headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock with Promising Prospects and 2 We Find Risky
